Body.Content:
This release enables M365 Copilot to reason over Power BI enterprise data and returns grounded answers directly from Power BI reports and semantic models. Users can ask natural‑language questions and receive accurate answers.

GA date: August CY2026

Preview date: June CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Power BI integration in M365 Copilot
